concerns.text: Plan.md lists contracts/ in project structure (Phase 1 output) but no task creates contracts. This is a plan element without a corresponding task.
Task T034 raises error 105 on pilot failure, but spec edge cases only define error codes 101-104. Error 105 is not documented in spec.md.

Task T034 mentions 'add a citation to a peer-reviewed source' but Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent verification for all citations. This verification step is not mentioned in the task.
T026 (power analysis) and T027 (independence mitigation) cover SC-003 requirements but lack explicit [SC-003] tags for traceability. Consider adding tags for better coverage visibility.
